ddls:
CREATE TABLE "snow_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "elevation_band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the elevation band for the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month when the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  "snow_depth" INTEGER /* Snow depth measurement in inches */,
  "snow_water_equivalent" REAL /* Snow water equivalent measurement in inches */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground sensors) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data entry */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snow_data_elevation_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("elevation_band_id") REFERENCES elevation_bands ("elevation_band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snow_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snow_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snow_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Longs Peak) */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location in feet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "last_surveyed" TEXT /* Date when the location was last surveyed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elevation_bands" (
  "elevation_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elevation band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the elevation band */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the elevation band */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower elevation bound of the band */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper elevation bound of the band */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature in the elevation band */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the elevation band data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elevation_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the month */,
  "days_in_month" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the month */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year when the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the year (e.g., winter, spring) */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the year */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Organization or institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES snow_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used for the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., snowpack analysis, avalanche prediction) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Key words or tags associated with the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification time of the report */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES snow_data ("data_id")
)
